item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Hal ini bukan berarti hak individu tidak diperhatikan, tetapi lebih pada cara kita menyeimbangkan antara kedua aspek tersebut.

notes: Agent A remains society-leaning but visibly softens from an initial agreement into balance language after Agent B's individual-rights frame. Agent B remains rights-first throughout, with bounded acknowledgments that communal harmony and collective justice can be reasonable in context. Agent A includes the English/misspelled term "non-negociable" in an Indonesian turn.
